statement: In every magma, Equation 891 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (x * z))`) implies Equation 3688 (`x * x = (y * y) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0720
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op y y) (op y y))
